name: tabbars
summary: Swappable bottom tab bars (5 variants) on the modern headless expo-router/ui Tabs. Token-driven, key-free.
postInstall: Copy src/features/navigation-tabs/layout-example.tsx to src/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx, then create a route file per tab (index.tsx, feed.tsx, account.tsx).
Switch styles with the `variant` prop: minimal | labeled | pill | floating | indicator.
Icons are app-provided: set item.icon = (focused) => <YourIcon … /> (the skeleton ships no icon set on purpose).
Uses expo-router/ui (SDK 54+ headless Tabs) — already in the skeleton; no react-navigation.
Refine styling after the Claude Design pass.
